subcodes.first_line: The verses have been revealed and the evidences made manifest, yet the servants remain heedless and veiled, occupied with that which perisheth and separated from the Eternal One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات نازل و بینات ظاهر ولکن عباد غافل و محجوب بفانی مشغولند و از حضرت باقی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @purpose; goal of creation, @justice and wrath of God
